display_name: MOMENTUM-PUMP-TIGHT (2026-06-14, regime-entry-hunt): the ONLY positive entry that survived a gate-independent forward test in the live SOL-pump tape — tight momentum-CONTINUATION (pc_h1 20-60 = committed but PRE-parabolic, liq>=30k HARD floor [the 20-30k band was the RUG pocket WR 0.44/-22%], mcap 80k-3M [winners cluster 140-600k], 1m volume surge). momentum_mode bypasses the dip-filter stack because our dip-buying INVERTS + bleeds in euphoria (dip entries WR 0.42 / ~-$341 net = the window bleed). THIN: n=11 fills / ~6 distinct winner tokens (AIELON = half), single 6.5h pump day — PAPER shadow, judge at n>=30 DISTINCT tokens vs momentum_shadow, promote only if >=+$2/tr AND catastrophe(<=-35%) rate <10%, NO $ projection. CAVEAT: no in-config SOL-regime gate yet (fires every regime; the SOL-pump-conditional version = chameleon GREEN mode). $50 fixed paper, daily $30.
